description_long: This modern outdoor lounge area features a spacious wooden deck with three sleek, contoured lounge chairs arranged for relaxation. The structure is covered by a large, flat roof with a wood-textured trim, providing ample shade and a contemporary aesthetic. The front and sides are enclosed by a black metal railing, enhancing safety while maintaining an open, airy feel. The back wall is solid and dark, likely glass or polished stone, reflecting the environment and adding a sense of privacy. The flooring appears to be light wood planks, contrasting with the darker elements and creating a warm, inviting atmosphere. The overall design is minimalist and functional, ideal for urban patios, rooftops, or park pavilions.
description: A modern outdoor lounge with a flat roof, wooden deck, three contoured lounge chairs, and black metal railings. The design is minimalist, with a mix of wood, metal, and dark wall elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three lounge chairs on a wooden deck, black metal railing, and the shaded area beneath the flat roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid side wall, partial view of the deck, and the overhanging roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, solid back wall and the full expanse of the flat roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, railing, and a partial glimpse of the lounge chairs and deck.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual, contoured lounge cushions, each attached to a separate lounge chair frame, evenly spaced on the deck; cushions are single-piece and appear fixed.
attribute_backrest_design: Each lounge chair features an integrated, gently sloped backrest that seamlessly transitions from the seat, with a smooth, minimalist profile and no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_presence: Absent; lounge chairs have no armrests, emphasizing an open, streamlined design.
attribute_leg_style: Lounge chairs have low-profile, straight metal legs, slightly angled for stability; legs are thin and unobtrusive, matching the black railing.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is solid-colored with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
